hero.description: Built with love by Eddy & Patricia as their family home on the ocean's edge. Today, three sea-facing villas with a 120° sunset panorama — open to those seeking true tranquility. Rated 9.6 Exceptional on Booking.com.

estate.title: Not a Hotel.
estate.description: What began as a dream of a couple from Bandung and Germany in 2013 is now three ocean-facing villas — a place where guests are welcomed like family by Abyan, Anik, and Dadang. Not artificial luxury. Genuine warmth.
estate.amenitiesSubtitle: Small details that make every guest feel at home
estate.additionalNote: *Diving, snorkeling, and island tours available through our team — just ask.

facilities.seaSunsetViewDesc: A different ocean and sunset panorama every day — right from your veranda.
facilities.privateVerandaDesc: Our guests' favorite spot for morning coffee and afternoon sunsets.
facilities.privateKitchenDesc: Full kitchen in Villa Cipaku — cook yourself or ask Anik for help.
facilities.privateGardenDesc: Private tropical garden at Villa Tivoli — wake up to birdsong.
facilities.airportTransferDesc: Shuttle service from airport or harbor available at an additional charge.
facilities.dailyHousekeepingDesc: Our housekeeping team ensures your villa is always clean and comfortable.
facilities.directBookingDesc: Book via WhatsApp — no agents, no commissions, 100% goes to the villa.
facilities.sunriseBreakfastDesc: Homemade toast, Patricia's handmade jam, and morning coffee with an ocean view.

suites.title: Every Villa Has Its Story
suites.description: Cipaku, Birdsong, Tivoli Garden — each one was built for someone special. Now it's your turn.

cipaku.name: Cipaku
cipaku.description: The family's main villa — full kitchen, private veranda, and the kind of peace only a homeowner knows. Built for Patricia and Eddy, now open for you.

birdsong.name: Birdsong
birdsong.description: Designed for the family's closest friends. The widest veranda at The Secret — like being embraced by the ocean and the sky at once.

tivoliGarden.name: Tivoli Garden
tivoliGarden.description: A villa with a hidden garden — where mornings begin with birdsong and the aroma of homemade bread. Flexible for couples or small families.

experience.title: Luxury Lives
experience.description: Homemade toast for breakfast. Rooftop yoga under the stars. Patricia's handmade jam. A different sunset every day, right before your eyes.

all.title: The Full Story
all.description: Every corner has a story. From ocean-facing verandas to hidden gardens, this is island life as it really is.

exteriors.title: Built with Love
exteriors.description: Where teak meets the tropics. Structures built by Eddy himself, blending seamlessly with the island landscape.

interiors.title: Like Your Own Home
interiors.description: Handcrafted wooden furniture, natural textures, and colors inspired by the Karimunjawa sea.

details.title: The Little Things
details.description: Homemade jam. Morning toast. Outdoor showers. True luxury is in what you touch.

night.title: After the Sun Goes Down
night.description: Warm lighting, ocean sounds, and a sky full of stars. Our rooftop is perfect for stargazing.

contact.title: We're Waiting
contact.description: Straight to us — no agents, no commissions. Like calling a friend's home. Abyan and the team are ready to help you plan the perfect visit.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.ctaText: Still have more questions? Our team is ready to assist you.
faq.ctaMessage: Hello, I would like to ask some questions regarding The Secret Karimunjawa.

reservation.q1: What are the check-in and check-out times at The Secret Karimunjawa?
reservation.a1: Check-in time is between 13:00 – 18:00 WIB. Guests are expected to inform us of their estimated arrival time in advance. Check-out time is between 06:00 – 10:00 WIB.
reservation.q2: What are the room rates at The Secret Karimunjawa?
reservation.a2: Our rates are dynamic and vary depending on the selected unit type and your stay dates (High/Low Season). Prices generally range from Rp 1,600,000 – Rp 2,000,000 per night. Please contact us to get the exact price for your preferred dates.
reservation.a3: On-site payments are generally in cash. For bookings via online platforms, credit cards can be used as a guarantee. Please contact us for more information regarding bank transfers.
reservation.q4: Can I book directly without using an OTA (Online Travel Agent)?
reservation.a4: Yes, absolutely! You can book directly via our WhatsApp with 0% commission. All transactions go 100% to the villa, allowing us to provide the best service for you.

facilities.q1: How many guests can stay in one unit?
facilities.a1: We have several villa options (1 to 2 bedrooms) designed to accommodate 2 to a maximum of 4 guests per unit. Perfect and popular for couples and family holidays.
facilities.a2_cipaku: Villa Cipaku (One-Bedroom) — King Size Bed 2x2m, fully equipped private kitchen, private veranda, 100% privacy.
facilities.a2_birdsong: Villa Birdsong (Deluxe) — King Size Bed, sea & sunset view, the widest veranda.
facilities.a2_tivoli: Villa Tivoli Garden (Superior) — 1 Queen Bed (1.8x2m) + 1 Single Bed (1.5x2m), private garden.
facilities.a2_note: All units face the ocean with a 120° sunset panorama.
facilities.q3: Does every unit have a balcony or terrace?
facilities.a3: Yes, every unit is equipped with a spacious private terrace or veranda, complete with Sea Views and Sunset Views.
facilities.q4: What facilities are available in the room?
facilities.a4_intro: Each unit is equipped with the following facilities:
facilities.q5: Are extra beds or baby cots available?
facilities.a5: We apologize, currently we do not provide baby cots or extra beds. Please contact us to discuss your specific needs.

dining.q1: Does The Secret Karimunjawa have an on-site restaurant?
dining.a1: Yes, we have an exclusive restaurant called The Secret Garden serving Indonesian, Indian, and Mediterranean cuisine. Halal, Vegetarian, Vegan, and dairy-free menus are also available.
dining.a2: Our breakfast is special — homemade toast, handmade jam, and various Asian, Vegetarian, and Vegan menu options. Can be served right on your veranda.
dining.q3: Is a reservation required for dinner?
dining.a3: Yes, we recommend guests book dinner in advance so our team can prepare the best dishes for you.

policies.a1: Yes, pets are allowed at The Secret Karimunjawa at no additional charge. Please confirm when booking so we can prepare a suitable unit.
policies.q2: Is smoking allowed in the rooms?
policies.a2: For the comfort of all guests, smoking is not permitted inside the rooms. Designated outdoor smoking areas are available.
policies.q3: What languages do the staff speak?
policies.a3: Our team communicates in Indonesian, English, and German.

location.q1: How far is The Secret from the city center and the beach?
location.a1: The Secret is the closest accommodation to the three main beaches of Karimunjawa! The nearest beach (Batu Topeng) is just a 15-minute walk or 2 minutes by scooter. To town it's about 10 minutes by scooter. Close enough to explore, far enough to enjoy the silence.
location.q2: Is an airport shuttle service available?
location.a2: Yes, we provide shuttle services from the Karimunjawa airport and harbor. This service is non-complimentary (surcharge applies). Please contact us upon booking to arrange the pick-up schedule.
location.q3: What activities can be done during the stay?
location.a3_intro: Plenty of options around The Secret:
a3_items: Relaxation: Massages (full body, back, neck, head, foot), Rooftop Yoga
Water Sports: Diving, Fishing, and Canoeing
Exploration: Hiking Mount Maming (3 hours), Bicycle & Scooter Rental
Beaches: Batu Topeng (15 min walk), Alano & Anora Beach (15 min scooter), Tanjung Gelam (20 min)
Entertainment: Karaoke, Stargazing from the rooftop

location.title: 10 Minutes from Town.
location.nearbyFooter: Distances are measured in a straight line. Actual travel distances may vary.

footer.description: Built with love. Welcomed like family. Three ocean-facing villas on the edge of Karimunjawa.
